question: What is the merchant ecosystem risk — how will self-operated brands coexist with existing marketplace sellers?

findings.claim: PDD's entire revenue base (~RMB 432B in FY2025) is derived from third-party merchants, making merchant ecosystem health existential
findings.data: PDD 20-F: 'For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024, substantially all of our revenues were derived from third-party merchants.' FY2025 total revenue: RMB 431,845.7M (US$61,753.1M), +10% YoY. Revenue splits into online marketing services (ads) and transaction services (commissions).

findings.claim: PDD has 14.2 million active merchants generating 55.3 million jobs as of 2025
findings.data: Pinduoduo platform has 14.2M active merchants (1420万活跃商家), spanning diverse categories and business types. Across merchant direct employment, warehouse/logistics employment, platform employees, and indirect employment, PDD has cumulatively generated 55.32M jobs domestically.

findings.claim: PDD Q3 2025 revenue breakdown: online marketing RMB 53.3B (+8% YoY), transaction services RMB 54.9B (+10% YoY) — both entirely from 3P merchants
findings.data: Q3 2025: Online marketing services revenue RMB 53,347.6M vs RMB 49,351.0M in Q3 2024 (+8%). Transaction services revenue RMB 54,928.9M vs RMB 50,003.4M in Q3 2024 (+10%). Q1 2025: Online marketing RMB 48,722.2M (+15%), transaction services RMB 46,950.0M (+6%).
